revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. --> ==Usage== This template generates:
* "NCID", which is an inline wikilink to the article "[[CiNii]]"
followed by
* one or more inline, external links to book items in the Japanese bibliographic database CiNii
The template's required parameter is the unique identifier (NCID) of the book in the database. Up to nine parameters are supported.
The template can also be used inside the {{para|id}} parameter of the various {{cite xxx}} citation templates.
===Example===
:<nowiki>{{NCID|BB17611495}}</nowiki> generates {{NCID|BB17611495}}
:External link''':''' <nowiki>http://ci.nii.ac.jp/ncid/BB17611495/</nowiki>
==See also== {{Wikidata property |1=P1739}} *{{tl|NAID}}, generates an inline, external link to a journal article in CiNii *{{tl|JPNO}} *{{tl|Catalog lookup link}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories go here: --> [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. --> ==Usage== This template generates:
* "NCID", which is an inline wikilink to the article "[[CiNii]]"
followed by
* one or more inline, external links to book items in the Japanese bibliographic database CiNii
The template's required parameter is the unique identifier (NCID) of the book in the database. Up to nine parameters are supported.
The template can also be used inside the {{para|id}} parameter of the various {{cite xxx}} citation templates.
===Example===
:<nowiki>{{NCID|BB17611495}}</nowiki> generates {{NCID|BB17611495}}
:External link''':''' <nowiki>http://ci.nii.ac.jp/ncid/BB17611495/</nowiki>
==See also== {{Wikidata property |1=P1739}} *{{tl|NAID}}, generates an inline, external link to a journal article in CiNii *{{tl|JPNO}} *{{tl|Catalog lookup link}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories go here: --> [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. --> ==Usage== This template generates:
* "NCID", which is an inline wikilink to the article "[[CiNii]]"
followed by
* one or more inline, external links to book items in the Japanese bibliographic database CiNii
The template's required parameter is the unique identifier (NCID) of the book in the database. Up to nine parameters are supported.
The template can also be used inside the {{para|id}} parameter of the various {{cite xxx}} citation templates.
===Example===
:<nowiki>{{NCID|BB17611495}}</nowiki> generates {{NCID|BB17611495}}
:External link''':''' <nowiki>http://ci.nii.ac.jp/ncid/BB17611495/</nowiki>
==See also== {{Wikidata property |1=P1739}} *{{tl|NAID}}, generates an inline, external link to a journal article in CiNii *{{tl|JPNO}} *{{tl|Catalog lookup link}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. --> ==Usage== This template generates:
* "NCID", which is an inline wikilink to the article "[[CiNii]]"
followed by
* one or more inline, external links to book items in the Japanese bibliographic database CiNii
The template's required parameter is the unique identifier (NCID) of the book in the database. Up to nine parameters are supported.
The template can also be used inside the {{para|id}} parameter of the various {{cite xxx}} citation templates.
===Example===
:<nowiki>{{NCID|BB17611495}}</nowiki> generates {{NCID|BB17611495}}
:External link''':''' <nowiki>http://ci.nii.ac.jp/ncid/BB17611495/</nowiki>

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515111839|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. --> ==Usage== This template generates:
* "NCID", which is an inline wikilink to the article "[[CiNii]]"
followed by
* one or more inline, external links to book items in the Japanese bibliographic database CiNii
The template's required parameter is the unique identifier (NCID) of the book in the database. Up to nine parameters are supported.
The template can also be used inside the {{para|id}} parameter of the various {{cite xxx}} citation templates.
===Example===
:<nowiki>{{NCID|BB17611495}}</nowiki> generates {{NCID|BB17611495}}
:External link''':''' <nowiki>http://ci.nii.ac.jp/ncid/BB17611495/</nowiki>
==See also== {{Wikidata property |1=P1739}} *{{tl|NAID}}, generates an inline, external link to a journal article in CiNii *{{tl|JPNO}} *{{tl|Catalog lookup link}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories go here: --> }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Catalog lookup templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
